title: Cumin Silk Broil
description: A herbal, silky, romantic Russian dish featuring cumin seeds, served as a light and comforting dinner option.

ingredients.name: 2 boneless skinless chicken breasts
ingredients.notes: preferably with some bones for added flavor

instructions: Cut the chicken breasts into slices if they're not already sliced. Season them with salt and black pepper on both sides.
Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, cumin seeds, and a pinch of salt. Sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant and slightly softened.
Gently toss the seasoned chicken pieces into the skillet, placing them skin-side down. Cook for another minute on each side or until well-browned.

Transfer the skillet to your oven-safe dish (a glass casserole is ideal) ensuring that all sides of the chicken are fully covered by the mixture. Bake at 400°F for about 25-30 minutes, until the juices run clear when a knife is inserted into the thickest part.
Remove from the heat and let it rest for about 10 minutes before serving with fresh parmesan cheese grated over top.
